title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NASSCOM Foundation - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NASSCOM Foundation - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the NASSCOM Foundation family as a Curriculum Developer in Kolkata. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NASSCOM Foundation:
NASSCOM Foundation is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NASSCOM Foundation!
